channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: YouTube is expanding its AI deepfake detection tool to all adult users
item.description: YouTube is expanding its AI likeness detection program to all users over the age of 18 - meaning just about anyone can have the platform hunt for potential deepfakes of themselves. The likeness detection feature uses a selfie-style scan of a person's face to monitor YouTube for lookalikes. If there is a match, YouTube alerts […]

item.title: Attack of the AI lawnmowers? Yarbo forced to patch products after experts reveal method to remotely hijack thousands of devices
item.description: A cybersecurity flaw in Yarbo robotic mowers exposed thousands of internet-connected devices to spying, hijacking, infrastructure, and surveillance risks.

item.title: I taught ChatGPT to distrust itself, and suddenly it stopped hallucinating
item.description: Telling ChatGPT to behave like a hostile auditor can make its answers more transparent and stop hallucinations

item.title: New crash data highlights the slow progress of Tesla's robotaxis
item.description: Two crashes since July 2025 involved robotaxis being driven by remote operators.

item.title: ‘Yellowstone’ sequel series ‘Dutton Ranch’ premieres tonight. Here’s how and where to watch it
item.description: The epic Western drama, having emerged as one of TV’s most lucrative franchises, continues the storyline on Paramount’s linear network and streaming platform. Giddy up, Yellowstone fans: The epic saga of the Dutton family continues.

item.title: Massive Lithium deposit potential worth $1.5 trillion found in Oregon — a huge cache could massively strengthen the US stance in building items such as smartphones, but environmentalists urge caution in acting too fast
item.description: Geologists discovered a massive lithium deposit beneath Oregon, triggering debates over mining expansion, environmental risks, and economic development opportunities.

item.title: Windows 11 tests an adjustable taskbar and resizable Start menu
item.description: Microsoft's latest Windows 11 test will allow you to reposition the taskbar and change the size of the Start menu. The update, which is rolling out to Windows 11 Insiders in the Experimental channel, lets you place the taskbar on the bottom, top, left, or right side of the screen. Microsoft first teased its movable […]

item.title: “I think it can be a point of no return” — experts issue warning as Chinese EV manufacturers hunt for European manufacturing plants
item.description: Chinese EV makers are pushing into Europe with plans to snap up idle manufacturing facilities

item.title: Two hi-fi greats just announced cool, curved new stereo speakers — one's passive, one's active, take your pick
item.description: Wharfedale's Denton 1S and Fyne Audio's Cubit 5 speakers are compact, powerful and promise superb sound
